description: Regression scenarios for repository reconnaissance, scope flags, and shallow-history reporting.

evals.name: guide-only-scoped-monorepo
expected_behavior: Limits reconnaissance to the requested scope where practical and labels any root-level context separately.
Does not write or modify AGENTS.md because --guide-only is set.
anti_behavior: Scanning unrelated workspaces as if they were in scope.
Inventing package-manager commands not present in the scoped files.

evals.name: agents-md-only-existing-guidance
evals.prompt: Use ywc-onboard-repo --agents-md-only in a repository with existing README and package scripts.
expected_behavior: Produces only the Starter AGENTS.md content.
Grounds build/test commands in discovered scripts.
Keeps uncertainty explicit when a convention cannot be detected.
anti_behavior: Also producing the full Onboarding Guide.
Overwriting existing project guidance without surfacing a diff.
Guessing CI commands not present in the repository context.

evals.name: anti-shallow-history-invention
evals.prompt: Onboard this repo and document commit conventions. Git history has only one commit.
expected_behavior: Reports that git conventions are unavailable or too shallow to detect.
Does not invent Conventional Commit usage from file content alone.
Records the evidence gap in the guide or AGENTS.md recommendation.
anti_behavior: Claiming conventional commits are used without enough history.
Treating branch naming as detected from one branch.
